# Local File Lock

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/lockingdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Locking / Lease SSOT](../locking.md)

Go implementation is owned by internal/lock.

| primitive | implementation | meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AcquireFile(ctx, path) | flock(2) exclusive advisory lock on Unix; claim-file emulation on Windows | waits until the lock is acquired or ctx is done |
| WithFile(ctx, path, fn) | acquire -> fn -> release | wraps adapter read-modify-write critical sections |

This primitive does not use sync.Mutex or sync.RWMutex. The concurrency boundary is the OS/local lock, not an actor state guard.

The production riido-task-db.v1 adapter is internal/agentbridge/controlplane/taskdbplane. Guarded mutation belongs to internal/taskdb, while taskdbplane alone may read-modify-write task DB, runtime registry, and lease sidecar under the same lock.
